author: vjan-nie
description: Verifies that the QA Hub's MongoDB Atlas instance is reachable and responds to the admin ping command. This is the primary infrastructure smoke test — if Atlas is down, nothing works.
notes: Rewritten from HTTP to bash in Roadmap 4. Atlas replaced local Docker MongoDB as the sole operational backend.
preconditions: Atlas cluster is reachable from current network
title: MongoDB Atlas responds to ping
